Artificial Intelligence (AI), in English artificial intelligence, therefore also artificial intelligence (AI), is a field of research in computer science, as well as various classes of algorithmic problem solving methods resulting from it, which perform certain actions based on input from their surroundings.
In public perception, machine learning and chatbots based on this principle are often equated with the concept of artificial intelligence.
At this time, applications in the areas of mobility and logistics, agriculture, health and optimisation of energy efficiency were predictable and partly realized.
